title: Fix dst IPv6 parse with version check in forward_mesh_to_upstream
description: In lichend.rs forward_mesh_to_upstream and gateway.rs mesh_to_upstream, ensure dst bytes[24..40] parse only after confirming version 6 and len>=40 (P1 fix). No assumptions on valid packet. No comments. Parent project-LICHEN-rmns.
close_reason: Fixed with 3 codereview passes per chunk, cargo test/clippy passed, branching and SRH path addressed using routes map and lookup, no comments added
